subcodes.first_line: O thou believer in God! Thy letter was received and read. Blessed be the newborn babe! Pray thou and supplicate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن بالله نامه ات رسید و قرائت گردید مولود جدید مبارک باد دعا کن و مناجات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @naming of children; of individuals
